prompt: Set up a 'Garden shed' project in my Home area with two sections, 'Materials' and 'Build'. Put a to-do 'Buy lumber' under Materials with a deadline of this Friday, and a to-do 'Assemble frame' under Build.
paraphrases: Create a new project called Garden shed in Home. Give it Materials and Build sections; under Materials add 'Buy lumber' due this Friday, and under Build add 'Assemble frame'.

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask p JOIN TMArea a ON p.area=a.uuid WHERE p.type=1 AND p.title='Garden shed' AND a.title='Home' AND p.trashed=0
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask h JOIN TMTask p ON h.project=p.uuid WHERE h.type=2 AND p.title='Garden shed' AND h.title IN ('Materials','Build') AND h.trashed=0
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask t JOIN TMTask h ON t.heading=h.uuid WHERE t.type=0 AND t.title='Buy lumber' AND h.title='Materials' AND t.deadline=132807680 AND t.trashed=0 AND t.status=0
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask t JOIN TMTask h ON t.heading=h.uuid WHERE t.type=0 AND t.title='Assemble frame' AND h.title='Build' AND t.trashed=0 AND t.status=0

pseudoScript: things todo add "Buy lumber" --project "Garden shed" --heading Materials --deadline 2026-07-24
things todo add "Assemble frame" --project "Garden shed" --heading Build
